cover.era_chip: 高麗 · 身分 構造
cover.subtitle:
양인과 천인 사이,
4신분의 사회.
cover.imagePrompt: 12th century Goryeo dynasty market street illustration showing four social classes. Foreground left: a high-ranking Goryeo aristocrat (gwijok) in jade-green silk robe with horsehair hat, attended by a servant. Center: a middle-class jung-in scribe with brush and book. Right: commoner farmers (yangmin) carrying tools. Background corner: lower-class nobi (slave) carrying water jars. Color: jade-green + earth-brown + ink-black + warm tan. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

timeline.text: 원 간섭기 권문세족 등장. 부원 세력.
공민왕 신진 사대부 등장. 신권 약화.

outro.tip_headline:
"문벌 → 무신 → 권문 → 사대부"
지배층 변천을 외울 것.
outro.tip_body: 심화 시험은 지배층 변천(문벌 귀족·무신·권문세족·신진 사대부) 시기 매칭, 음서·공음전 세습, 향·소·부곡 특수 행정 구역, 노비안검법 빈출.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized vertical pyramid divided into four horizontal layers (suggesting 4 social classes), each with a small silhouette icon. Jade-green + amber #C77B3D accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image.
